title: Platter 5-stars for De Krans
bodyText: [{"type":"paragraph","text":"CALITZDORP  NEWS - With only two port-style wines receiving the coveted 5-star rating in the 46th edition of the Platter's by Diners Club Wine Guide 2026, De Krans Wines in Calitzdorp has once again affirmed its position as one of South Africa’s leading producers.","html":"CALITZDORP NEWS - With only two port-style wines receiving the coveted 5-star rating in the 46th edition of the Platter's by Diners Club Wine Guide 2026, De Krans Wines in Calitzdorp has once again affirmed its position as one of South Africa’s leading producers."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"This is not the first time the De Krans Cape Vintage Reserve has earned this distinction."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Over the past 15 years, this premium port-style wine has consistently been awarded a 5-star rating. According to winemaker Christoff de Wet, it is a substantial wine, full of ripe dark fruit notes such as plum, mulberry, and blackcurrant. Well-rounded with smooth, dark chocolate undertones and firm tannins, it is a wine that will mature beautifully over the course of 30 years.","html":"Over the past 15 years, this premium port-style wine has consistently been awarded a 5-star rating. According to winemaker Christoff de Wet, it is a substantial wine, full of ripe dark fruit notes such as plum, mulberry, and blackcurrant. Well-rounded with smooth, dark chocolate undertones and firm tannins, it is a wine that will mature beautifully over the course of 30 years."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Close behind, with 4.5-star ratings, were the De Krans Tritonia Calitzdorp (Red) Blend 2023, De Krans Tritonia Verdelho 2023, De Krans Cape Tawny, De Krans Cape Vintage 2023, De Krans Vintage 2022, De Krans Muscat Blanc 2025, and the Garden Route Sauvignon Blanc 2025.","html":"Close behind, with 4.5-star ratings, were the De Krans Tritonia Calitzdorp (Red) Blend 2023, De Krans Tritonia Verdelho 2023, De Krans Cape Tawny, De Krans Cape Vintage 2023, De Krans Vintage 2022, De Krans Muscat Blanc 2025, and the Garden Route Sauvignon Blanc 2025."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Four-star ratings were awarded to the De Krans Classic Varietal Chardonnay 2024, De Krans Tinta Roriz 2022, De Krans Touriga Nacional 2024, De Krans Cape Ruby, and the Garden Route Shiraz 2022.","html":"Four-star ratings were awarded to the De Krans Classic Varietal Chardonnay 2024, De Krans Tinta Roriz 2022, De Krans Touriga Nacional 2024, De Krans Cape Ruby, and the Garden Route Shiraz 2022."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"This latest recognition not only reaffirms De Krans’ commitment to producing quality wines and port-style wines, but also its dedication to Portuguese varietals. The Tritonia Verdelho, for example, was recently named Best Niche White Variety at this year’s Trophy Wine Show, and was also selected for Caroline’s Fine Wines White Wine Review.","html":"This latest recognition not only reaffirms De Krans’ commitment to producing quality wines and port-style wines, but also its dedication to Portuguese varietals. The Tritonia Verdelho, for example, was recently named Best Niche White Variety at this year’s Trophy Wine Show, and was also selected for Caroline’s Fine Wines White Wine Review."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Since introducing South Africa’s first Touriga Nacional single-varietal wine in 2000, De Krans has been a pioneer in cultivating these grapes in the Little Karoo region, taking advantage of its similarities to Portugal’s Douro Valley. By innovating and presenting these varieties authentically, they have showcased the versatility of Portuguese grapes, which transition seamlessly from full-bodied dry reds to rich, complex port-style wines.","html":"Since introducing South Africa’s first Touriga Nacional single-varietal wine in 2000, De Krans has been a pioneer in cultivating these grapes in the Little Karoo region, taking advantage of its similarities to Portugal’s Douro Valley. By innovating and presenting these varieties authentically, they have showcased the versatility of Portuguese grapes, which transition seamlessly from full-bodied dry reds to rich, complex port-style wines."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"With roots in Calitzdorp dating back to the 1890s, De Krans Wines has firmly established the reputation of Portuguese grape varieties in the region. These varietals have proven their longevity and secured their place in the industry.","html":"With roots in Calitzdorp dating back to the 1890s, De Krans Wines has firmly established the reputation of Portuguese grape varieties in the region. These varietals have proven their longevity and secured their place in the industry."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’","html":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’"}]
